docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OMRAN, CARMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYNOSO, CARMEN-VIA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,082.00, CARMEN REYNOSO-VIA SUED HEREIN AS CARMEN ROSA VIA. JUDGE DISCLOSED THAT HE CURRENTLY REPRESENTS JANET (LEONETTE) OMRAN AND ALSO REPRESENTED GEORGE OMRAN OF DALY CITY. NEITHER PARTY IS CONNECTED TO THEM AND EACH WAIVES ANY CONFLICT AND ELECTS TO PROCEED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION CORRECTING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OF MAY-14-2007, GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, CARMEN-VIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY OMRAN, CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, CARMEN-VIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, CARMEN-VIA
MOTION CORRECTING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OMRAN, CARMEN HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION UPDATING DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS.
